div1.entryFree: Trade, vb. to traffic, to carry on commerce, to deal: they shall be my East and West Indies, and I will t. to them both, Wiv. I, 3, 79. the common ferry which --s to Venice, Merch. III, 4, 54. we shall have good --ing that way, H4A II, 4, 401. how did you dare to t. and traffic with Macbeth in riddles and affairs of death, Mcb. III, 5, 4. music, moody food of us that t. in love, Ant. II, 5, 2.
